title: Bloom-Diamond
description: A resource pack with a built-in vanilla shader that adds a bloom effect to all diamonds in the world.
body:
This resource pack uses **vanilla-shaders** to add a bloom effect to all diamonds in the world.
The glow makes diamonds easier to spot and adds a soft, aesthetic shine — perfect for survival players and cave explorers alike.

**✔ Enhances diamond visibility**
**✔ Built on vanilla shader system (no mods required)**
**✔ Great for exploration, mining, and aesthetics**

## To enable the bloom effect, go to Settings → Video Settings → Graphics = Fabulous!
